indicators.name: High ceiling
indicators.rationale: A high ceiling allows for more movement and space for yoga poses.

indicators.name: Large windows
indicators.rationale: Natural light can enhance the yoga experience and create a calming atmosphere.

indicators.name: Open space
indicators.rationale: An open space allows for a variety of yoga poses without obstruction.

reasoning_summary: The indoor scene is marginally adequate for yoga / stretching due to its high ceiling, large windows, and open space, but lacks specific features like mats or props.
